text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 361 

PRE_ICL_INPP_COPAY_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Copay In-Network Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 
1- or 3-months) on this tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP) during the pre-initial 
coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit.
